title: An Act to Support the Maintenance, Preservation and Promotion of State Historic Sites
last_house_action: 5/20/2025 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY suggested and ordered printed On motion by Senator TALBOT ROSS of Cumberland Tabled until Later in Today's Session, pending REFERENCE Taken from the table by the President On motion by Same Senator The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on APPROPRIATIONS AND FINANCIAL AFFAIRS Sent down for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . In NON-CONCURRENCE and sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
READ On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland Tabled until Later in Today's Session, pending CONSIDERATION Unfinished Business
On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland The Senate RECEDED and CONCURRED With The Bill REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY in concurrence
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-56) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-56) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-56) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT - Emergency -2/3 Elected Required
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)
